<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaaldraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-sìng]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[hak:Kâng-sìn]][[ja:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[nds:Metall-Draken]][[vi:Canh Thìn]][[za:Gengsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-sîn]][[zh-yue:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]]

'''Yang Metal Dragon also known as 庚辰''' (kanoetatsu, koukinnotatsu, koushin) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 17th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Earth Rabbit]] and followed by [[Yin Metal Snake]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Kanoe (庚)]] represents yang [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon (辰)]] represents yang [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], establishing a generating relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Generation]]) (i.e. Earth generates Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Dragon (庚辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 san4
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongjin (경진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Thìn

==Years of Yang Metal Dragon==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 20 when divided by 60 is a year of [[Yang Metal Dragon]] ([[Year|year]]).
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Metal Dragon (庚辰)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium BC|1st Millennium BC]] !! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[10th century BC]]
* [[9th century BC]]
* [[821 BC]]
* [[761 BC]]
* [[701 BC]]
* [[641 BC]]
* [[581 BC]]
* [[521 BC]]
* [[461 BC]]
* [[401 BC]]
* [[341 BC]]
* [[281 BC]]
* [[221 BC]]
* [[161 BC]]
* [[101 BC]]
* [[41 BC]]
|
* [[AD 20|20 AD]]
* [[AD 80|80 AD]]
* [[AD 140|140 AD]]
* [[200|200 AD]]
* [[260|260 AD]]
* [[320|320 AD]]
* [[380|380 AD]]
* [[440|440 AD]]
* [[AD 500|500 AD]]
* [[560|560 AD]]
* [[620|620 AD]]
* [[680|680 AD]]
* [[740|740 AD]]
* [[800|800 AD]]
* [[860|860 AD]]
* [[920|920 AD]]
* [[980|980 AD]]
|
* [[1040|1040 AD]]
* [[1100|1100 AD]]
* [[1160|1160 AD]]
* [[1220|1220 AD]]
* [[1280|1280 AD]]
* [[1340|1340 AD]]
* [[1400|1400 AD]]
* [[1460|1460 AD]]
* [[1520|1520 AD]]
* [[1580|1580 AD]]
* [[1640|1640 AD]]
* [[1700|1700 AD]]
* [[1760|1760 AD]]
* [[1820|1820 AD]]
* [[1880|1880 AD]]
* [[1940|1940 AD]]
* [[2000|2000 AD]]
|
* [[2060 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2120 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2180 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2240 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2300 AD]]
* [[24th century|2360 AD]]
* [[2420 AD]]
* [[2480 AD]]
* [[2540 AD]]
* [[2600 AD]]
* [[2660 AD]]
* [[2720 AD]]
* [[2780 AD]]
* [[2840 AD]]
* [[2900 AD]]
* [[2960 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoe (庚)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the month of [[March]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yang Metal Dragon]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the seasonal month (from [[Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[Lixia]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Dragon==
* [[Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[Japan]])'s birthday.

=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of [[Yang Metal Dragon]] is the 3rd day of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|Small Earth]].

==See Also==
{{wikidata link|Q1062146}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
